checks.description: The Cisco switch must not be configured to have any feature enabled that calls home to the vendor.
The Cisco switch must be configured to have IP directed broadcast disabled on all interfaces.
The Cisco perimeter switch must be configured to block all packets with any IP options.
The Cisco BGP switch must be configured to check whether a single-hop eBGP peer is directly connected.

check.command: show running-config | section "^router bgp" | include "^ no enforce-first-as$"

checks.description: The Cisco BGP switch must be configured to reject route advertisements from BGP peers that do not list their autonomous system (AS) number as the first AS in the AS_PATH attribute.

check.command: show running-config | include "^no mpls ip propagate-ttl$"

checks.description: The Cisco MPLS switch must be configured to have TTL Propagation disabled.
The Cisco PE switch must be configured to ignore or drop all packets with any IP options.
